name: Betty Crocker Easy Turtle Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Cover a baking sheet with aluminum foil, shiny side up and lightly grease it.
3. For each candy combination, place three pecan halves in a "Y" shape on the foil.
4. Place one caramel candy in the center of each "Y".
5. Bake until the caramel is melted, about 9-10 minutes.
6. Heat shortening and chocolate chips over low heat until the chocolate is melted.
7. Spread the melted chocolate mixture over the candies.
8. Refrigerate for 30 minutes before serving.
